commands.review_summary:
The branch adds retry/backoff and sequential deletion for transient memory-core atomic reindex cleanup failures, exports the cleanup helper for tests, and adds EBUSY cleanup retry coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main removes temp SQLite sidecars once and in parallel, so a transient EBUSY from fs.rm propagates, and https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/79708 provides matching Windows 11 logs. I did not establish a live Windows/Samba failing run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer coordination with an overlapping open PR, not a narrow repair defect for automation.

target.title: fix(memory): retry EBUSY on temp-db cleanup during memory index --force (#79708)
